rules.//identity_model: This ruleset requires Firebase Authentication (Anonymous, Google, etc.). It uses 'auth.uid' to distinguish between the Host and Contestants.

$gameId.//gameId: GLOBAL READ: Anyone who knows the Game ID can read the mission status.
$gameId.//hostUid: GLOBAL WRITE (HOST): If you are the Host, you have authority over the entire game node. This eliminates the need to repeat the host check on every sub-field.

hostUid.//hostUid_validate: IMMUTABLE: hostUid should never change after creation.

gameId.//gameId_validate: IMMUTABLE: gameId must match the path and never change.

$gameId.//contestant_authority: CONTESTANT ADDITIVE RULES: These rules apply ONLY if the user is NOT the host (since the host already has access above).

currentQuestion.//currentQuestion_write: Allow the designated querent to publish their question.

questionStatus.//questionStatus_write: Allow the designated querent to update their typing status.

$playerId.//playerId_write: Let a new player join if they are using their own authenticated UID.

$playerId.//playerId_submission: Let each agent submit their own guess anonymously.
